properties.name: Main Rd / Dreyersdal Rd (N1) — LOS F
properties.notes: TIA Int.4; right-turn from Dreyersdal onto Main Rd operates at LOS F in both AM and PM peaks; 11% of school trips arrive via Dreyersdal Rd from north

properties.name: Dreyersdal Rd / Dreyersdal Farm Rd junction
properties.notes: Yield-controlled T-junction where Dreyersdal Farm Rd branches west from Dreyersdal Rd; key decision point for rat-run routes 1A-RR1 through 1A-RR6. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Dreyersdal Farm Rd / Starke Rd south
properties.notes: Yield-controlled junction at south end of Starke Rd where Dreyersdal Farm Rd meets; used by routes 1A, 1A-RR2 through 1A-RR4. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Starke Rd / Christopher Rd (N5)
properties.notes: TIA Int.5; 2-way stop — Christopher Rd stops for Starke Rd which is free-flowing; critical funnel convergence before school ingress sequence for most routes

properties.name: Christopher Rd / Vineyard Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; penultimate junction before school ingress J7 for main routes; Vineyard Rd connects eastward to Airlie Rd (J19). Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Vineyard Rd / Leyden Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; last junction before school ingress J7; also terminus of rat-run routes 2A-RR1, 3A-RR1 via Clement Rd. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: School Ingress — Leyden Rd / Ruskin Rd
properties.notes: Critical bottleneck; all main ingress routes terminate here; raised intersection proposed; 22 on-street parking bays proposed on Ruskin Rd; terminal node for all ingress routes in simulation

properties.name: Ladies Mile / Children's Way (N3) — signalised
properties.notes: TIA Int.3; traffic signal; 25% of school trips arrive via Children's Way from east; dual-carriageway Ladies Mile Road (M39) with bicycle lanes and sidewalks

properties.name: Ladies Mile / Homestead Ave (N4)
properties.notes: TIA Int.2; priority stop; 21% of school trips arrive via Homestead Ave from east; entry node for routes 2A and 2A-RR1/RR2

properties.name: Homestead Ave / Starke Rd
properties.notes: 4-way priority stop; intersection of Homestead Ave and Starke Rd north; used by rat-run routes 2A-RR2 and 3A-RR2. Control type from L2 network data — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Firgrove Way west entry
properties.notes: Yield-controlled western entry to Firgrove Way; Class 4 Collector with bicycle lanes; used by routes 3A, 3A-RR1, 3A-RR2. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Starke Rd north / Firgrove Rd junction
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; junction of Starke Rd north arm and Firgrove Way; used by rat-run route 3A-RR2 bypassing Ladies Mile. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Firgrove Way / Dreyersdal Rd
properties.notes: TIA Int.1; priority stop; 12% of school trips arrive from south along Starke Rd via Firgrove Way; entry node for route 3A and its rat runs

properties.name: Airlie Rd south / Dante Rd south (shared)
properties.notes: Yield-controlled junction at southern ends of both Airlie Rd and Dante Rd; used by rat-run routes 1A-RR4, 1A-RR5 from Tussendal Ave. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Airlie Rd / Dreyersdal Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; junction of Airlie Rd and Dreyersdal Rd; used by rat-run route 1A-RR1 and main route 2B. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Dante Rd / Vineyard Rd junction
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Dante Rd meets Vineyard Rd; used by rat-run routes 1A-RR2, 1A-RR3, 2B-RR2, 2B-RR3. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Dante Rd / Ruskin Rd junction
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; terminal junction for rat-run routes 1A-RR3, 1A-RR4, 2B-RR3 that deliver directly to Ruskin Rd; 30 km/h, 400 veh/hr capacity. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Dreyersdal Rd / Christopher Rd east
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Dreyersdal Rd meets Christopher Rd east extension; used by routes 1A-RR1, 2A, 2B, 3A on primary corridor toward J4. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Vineyard Rd east / Airlie Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; eastern end of Vineyard Rd at Airlie Rd; cut-through used by rat-run routes 1A-RR2, 1A-RR3, 1A-RR4, 2B-RR2, 2B-RR3. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: School Egress — Aristea Rd (school gate end)
properties.notes: School egress point at southern (school gate) end of Aristea Rd cul-de-sac; 20 km/h, 350 veh/hr capacity; raised intersection proposed; sidewalk on school side proposed. The planned mini-roundabout is NOT here — it is at the Ruskin/Aristea junction to the north (J29).

properties.name: Dreyersdal Farm Rd / Tussendal Avenue
properties.notes: Yield-controlled junction of Dreyersdal Farm Rd and Tussendal Avenue; used by rat-run routes 1A-RR5 and 1A-RR6. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Starke Rd / Airlie Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Starke Rd meets Airlie Rd; key junction on main routes 1A and 2B-RR1 travelling south on Starke Rd toward J4/J5. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Tussendal Avenue / Airlie Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Tussendal Ave meets Airlie Rd; used by rat-run routes 1A-RR4, 1A-RR5, 1A-RR6 from Dreyersdal Farm Rd. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Starke Rd / Clement Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Starke Rd meets Clement Rd; used by rat-run routes 2A-RR1, 2A-RR2, 3A-RR1, 3A-RR2 bypassing J4 via Clement Rd. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Clement Rd / Leyden Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; western end of Clement Rd at Leyden Rd; terminal junction for rat-run routes 2A-RR1, 3A-RR1 arriving at J6. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Children's Way / Dreyersdal Rd
properties.notes: 4-way priority stop; Children's Way meets Dreyersdal Rd; entry node for routes 2B, 2B-RR1, 2B-RR2, 2B-RR3 from Ladies Mile signal. Control type from L2 network data — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Children's Way / Starke Rd
properties.notes: Stop-controlled; Children's Way meets Starke Rd; used by routes 1A, 1A-RR2 through 1A-RR4, 2B-RR1, 2B-RR2, 2B-RR3. Control type inferred from road hierarchy — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Homestead Ave / Dreyersdal Rd
properties.notes: 4-way priority stop; Homestead Ave meets Dreyersdal Rd; used by routes 2A, 2A-RR1, 2A-RR2, 3A as second junction after Ladies Mile entry. Control type from L2 network data — not ground-truthed.

properties.name: Ruskin Rd / Aristea Rd — planned roundabout
properties.notes: Planned mini-roundabout at the Ruskin Rd / Aristea Rd intersection, as recommended in the TIA for egress flow smoothing. This junction controls outbound vehicles leaving via Aristea Rd after drop-off. In the simulation model, it improves throughput on the egress corridor relative to the current stop-controlled arrangement. Coordinates confirmed from Aristea Road geometry (way/27669895) at the Ruskin Rd intersection point.
